name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Provides affordable housing to urban poor through credit-linked subsidy.
benefits: Home loan subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh. Interest subsidy of 6.5% for EWS/LIG.
apply_steps: Visit the official PMAY website or nearest Common Service Centre (CSC)
Fill the online application form with personal and income details
Upload required documents — Aadhaar, income certificate, address proof
Submit and note your Application Reference Number
Track status on the PMAY portal using your reference number

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from BPL households.
benefits: Free LPG connection with first refill and stove for BPL families.
apply_steps: Visit your nearest LPG distributor (HP Gas, Bharat Gas, or Indane)
Collect and fill the KYC Form (Form 1 & Form 2)
Submit with Aadhaar card and BPL ration card
Verification is done by the distributor
Connection is provided within 3 working days

name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Direct income support of ₹6,000/year to small and marginal farmers.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 equal installments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank account.
apply_steps: Visit the PM-KISAN portal or nearest CSC
Click on 'New Farmer Registration'
Enter Aadhaar number and mobile number
Fill in land details and bank account information
Submit and verify via OTP sent to registered mobile

name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: World's largest health insurance scheme — ₹5 lakh health cover per family.
benefits: Health insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
apply_steps: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in using mobile/ration card number
Visit nearest empaneled hospital or Ayushman Mitra kiosk
Carry Aadhaar card and ration card for verification
Ayushman Mitra will generate your e-card
Use e-card at any empaneled hospital for cashless treatment

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarship for OBC students studying in Class 1-10.
benefits: ₹1,000 to ₹2,500 per year for day scholars; higher for hostelers.
apply_steps: Register on the National Scholarship Portal at scholarships.gov.in
Login and select 'Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC'
Fill in academic and personal details
Upload required documents
Submit before the deadline (usually October 31)

name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Scholarship to SC students in Class 9 and 10 to reduce dropout rates.
benefits: ₹3,500 per year (day scholars) to ₹7,000 per year (hostelers).
apply_steps: Go to scholarships.gov.in and register
Select 'Pre-Matric Scholarship for SC Students'
Fill in your details and upload documents
Verify via OTP on mobile
Submit application and note registration number

name: Post-Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Financial aid for ST students in Class 11 and above.
benefits: Course fees, maintenance allowance, and other charges covered fully.
apply_steps: Register on scholarships.gov.in
Select Post-Matric Scholarship for ST students
Enter academic and personal details
Upload all required documents
Submit and track status on portal

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Zero-balance savings account with insurance and overdraft facility.
benefits: Zero-balance account, RuPay debit card, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life cover, ₹10,000 overdraft.
documents: Aadhaar Card OR Voter ID OR Passport
apply_steps: Visit any bank branch or Business Correspondent (BC) outlet
Fill the Jan Dhan account opening form
Submit one valid photo ID (Aadhaar preferred)
Account is opened on the spot (zero balance)
RuPay card is dispatched to your address within 10 days

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
description: Collateral-free loans for micro and small businesses.
benefits: Loans from ₹50,000 to ₹10 lakh under Shishu, Kishor, and Tarun categories.
apply_steps: Prepare a brief business plan describing your activity
Visit nearest PSU bank, MFI, or NBFC offering MUDRA loans
Fill the MUDRA loan application form
Submit documents — Aadhaar, PAN, business address proof
Loan is sanctioned within 7-30 days after verification

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accident insurance cover for ₹2 lakh at just ₹20/year premium.
benefits: ₹2 lakh on accidental death or permanent total disability, ₹1 lakh on partial disability.
apply_steps: Visit your bank branch or apply via net banking / UPI app
Fill the PMSBY enrollment form
Give consent for auto-debit of ₹20 per year
Policy number is issued immediately
Renews automatically every June 1

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Life insurance of ₹2 lakh at ₹436/year for any reason of death.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life insurance coverage. Renewable annually.
apply_steps: Contact your bank or apply online via net banking
Fill enrollment form for PMJJBY
Auto-debit of ₹436 authorized annually
Policy issued immediately
In case of death, nominee claims ₹2 lakh at bank branch

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: Savings scheme for the girl child with high interest and tax benefits.
benefits: 8.2% interest rate (2024). Tax-free maturity amount. Matures when girl turns 21.
apply_steps: Visit nearest Post Office or authorized bank branch
Fill SSY account opening form
Minimum deposit ₹250 to open account
Deposit up to ₹1.5 lakh per year
Account matures when girl turns 21 or on marriage after 18

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Initiative to address declining child sex ratio and promote girl education.
benefits: Free education, scholarships, and awareness programs for girls.
apply_steps: Contact local Anganwadi center or District Education Office
Register daughter for BBBP benefits
Avail free school enrollment and scholarship benefits
Link with Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana for maximum benefit

name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
description: Special savings scheme for women offering 7.5% interest.
benefits: 7.5% interest per annum, partial withdrawal allowed after 1 year.
apply_steps: Visit Post Office or bank offering this scheme
Fill account opening form
Invest from ₹1,000 to ₹2 lakh
Certificate matures in 2 years with high interest
Partial withdrawal of 40% allowed after 1 year

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000/month after age 60.
apply_steps: Visit your savings bank branch
Fill APY registration form
Choose monthly contribution based on pension amount desired
Auto-debit set up from your account
PRAN (Permanent Retirement Account Number) issued

name: National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS)
description: One-time lump sum assistance to BPL families on death of breadwinner.
benefits: ₹20,000 one-time assistance to family on death of breadwinner (18–64 years).
apply_steps: Contact local Block Development Office (BDO) or Gram Panchayat
Fill the NFBS application form within 3 months of death
Submit death certificate and BPL card
Collector/DC approves the claim
Amount credited to account within 30 days

name: CGTMSE - Credit Guarantee Scheme for MSMEs
description: Collateral-free credit up to ₹2 crore for micro and small enterprises.
benefits: Loans up to ₹2 crore without collateral for new and existing MSMEs.
apply_steps: Register your business on Udyam Portal (udyamregistration.gov.in)
Approach a member lending institution (PSU bank, SIDBI, etc.)
Submit loan application with business plan
Bank applies for CGTMSE guarantee cover
Loan sanctioned without any collateral required

name: Mahatma Gandhi NREGS (MGNREGA)
description: Guarantees 100 days of unskilled wage employment per year to rural households.
benefits: 100 days of employment per year at ₹220–₹350/day (varies by state). Maharashtra: ₹273/day.
apply_steps: Visit nearest Gram Panchayat office
Fill the MGNREGA Job Card application
Job Card issued within 15 days
Demand work in writing at Gram Panchayat
Work must be provided within 15 days of demand

name: Mahatma Phule Jan Arogya Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Maharashtra state health scheme covering ₹1.5 lakh per year for 1,000+ procedures.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹1.5 lakh per family at 500+ hospitals in Maharashtra.
apply_steps: Check eligibility — hold yellow, orange, or white ration card
Visit empaneled hospital in Maharashtra
Show Aadhaar and ration card at Aarogya Mitra desk
Pre-authorization is taken by hospital from MPJAY
Treatment is fully cashless up to ₹1.5 lakh

name: Mukhyamantri Ladki Bahin Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Monthly financial aid of ₹1,500 to eligible women in Maharashtra.
benefits: ₹1,500 per month directly credited to women's bank account.
apply_steps: Visit nearest Anganwadi, Seva Kendra, or apply online
Fill the application form with personal details
Submit Aadhaar, income certificate, and domicile proof
Application verified by local authorities
₹1,500 credited monthly after approval

name: Birsa Munda Krishi Kranti Yojana (Maharashtra)
description: Agricultural support and irrigation assistance for tribal farmers in Maharashtra.
benefits: Drip/sprinkler irrigation systems, farm ponds, and equipment subsidy up to ₹1 lakh.
apply_steps: Register on MahaDBT portal (mahadbt.maharashtra.gov.in)
Login and select 'Agriculture Department' schemes
Choose Birsa Munda Krishi Kranti Yojana
Fill form and upload required documents
Application reviewed by district agriculture office

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Support for traditional artisans and craftspeople with training and collateral-free loans.
benefits: ₹15,000 toolkit grant, ₹1–2 lakh loan at 5% interest, free skill training, digital payment incentive.
apply_steps: Register at nearest CSC or on pmvishwakarma.gov.in
Select your craft/trade from the 18 listed categories
Biometric verification at CSC
Training and certification completed
Toolkit grant and loan disbursed after certification

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh–₹1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs.
benefits: Composite loan from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprise. 7-year repayment.
apply_steps: Check eligibility on standupmitra.in portal
Register and create your profile
Get connected to nearest bank branch
Submit business plan and required documents
Loan sanctioned within 30 days

name: Annasaheb Patil Loan Guarantee Scheme (Maharashtra)
description: Loan guarantee for Marathas and open category youth for business.
benefits: Loan guarantee for loans from ₹50,000 to ₹15 lakh for business purposes.
apply_steps: Register on MahaVikas portal
Select Annasaheb Patil Loan scheme
Fill application with business details
Submit required documents online
Loan processed through partner banks
